flags.message: Mis-provisioned forward cell: context.json says mode=forward, but the provisioned snapshot (record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json) already contains this case's disposition — docket entries of May 11 2026 record the petition's resolution and an issued judgment, i.e. the snapshot's tail is terminal. Provisioning should have refused this forward cell. I did not fold the terminal entries into the forecast (reasoning uses only the pre-decision record, the provisioned BIO, and statpack base rates), but the cell cannot be scored as genuine forward skill and the evaluation should discount it. Separately: the corpus query sidecar at 127.0.0.1:8377 was unreachable (both fedcourts query calls timed out), so prior retrieval was degraded to the committed statpack.
